name: Siri Orb
desc: Animated Siri-style audio visualizer orb with reactive wave animations and glowing effects. Built with CSS conic-gradients and blend modes.

name: Glow Particles
desc: Floating, pulsing particles with glow halos rendered via PixiJS WebGL. High-performance 2D particle system with smooth animations.

name: Layout Animation
desc: Smooth layout animations powered by Motion (Framer). Cards expand, collapse, and reflow with spring-based transitions using layoutId and the layout prop.

name: Spring Physics Animation
desc: Physics-based spring animations that feel natural and alive. Stagger cards, bounce elements, and create fluid transitions powered by real spring dynamics.

name: Auto Animate
desc: Zero-config automatic animations for adding, removing, and reordering list items. Drop-in smooth transitions with a single hook -- no keyframes or spring configs needed.

name: Scroll Parallax
desc: Multi-layer parallax scrolling effect where elements move at different speeds as you scroll, creating an immersive depth illusion. Powered by react-scroll-parallax.

name: Text Typewriter
desc: Typewriter animation that cycles through phrases with a blinking cursor. Powered by react-type-animation.

name: 3D Card Tilt
desc: Interactive 3D tilt effect with glare on hover. Powered by react-parallax-tilt.

name: Infinite Marquee
desc: Smoothly scrolling infinite marquee with pause-on-hover and gradient edges. Powered by react-fast-marquee.

name: Hand-drawn Annotation
desc: Animate hand-drawn style annotations on text — underlines, circles, highlights, and brackets that feel sketchy and personal.

name: Animated Number
desc: Smoothly animated number transitions that morph digits in place. Perfect for dashboards, counters, and stats that update in real time.

name: Animated Counter
desc: Smooth count-up animations that bring numbers to life. Perfect for dashboards, statistics sections, and landing pages that showcase impressive metrics.

name: Confetti Rain
desc: Colorful confetti particles rain down to celebrate actions and milestones. Contained within any element, not just full-screen.

name: Awesome Reveal
desc: React components to add reveal animations using the Intersection Observer API and CSS Animations.

name: Rewards
desc: This package lets you easily add micro-interactions to your app and reward users with the rain of confetti, emoji or balloons.

name: Embla Carousel React
desc: A lightweight carousel library with fluid motion and great swipe precision

name: Loading Skeleton
desc: Make beautiful, animated loading skeletons that automatically adapt to your app.

name: Spinners
desc: A collection of beautiful react loading spinners with smooth animations.

name: Lottie Animations
desc: Render After Effects animations natively in React using the Lottie format for lightweight, scalable vector animations.

name: Haiku
desc: React Hook & Utility Library — custom cursor follower with glowing trail that tracks mouse position with smooth delay.

name: Transition State
desc: Zero dependency React transition state machine. Toggle elements with enter/exit animations using a simple hook-based API.

name: Scroll Motion
desc: Easy scroll-driven animations with React. Elements fade, slide, zoom, and stick as you scroll through pages.

name: Lenis
desc: How smooth scroll should be. Adds inertia-based smooth scrolling with natural momentum and buttery 60fps performance.

name: Use Ripple Hook
desc: Customizable, lightweight React hook for implementing Google's Material UI style ripple effect

name: Light Beam
desc: A customizable React component that creates a light beam effect using conic gradients. Supports dark mode and various customization options.

name: Content Loader
desc: SVG-Powered component to easily create placeholder loadings (like Facebook cards loading)

name: Hamburger React
desc: Animated hamburger menu icons for React

name: Blob
desc: React component that looks like liquid in space

name: Simplex Noise
desc: simplex-noise is a fast simplex noise implementation in Javascript. Works in node and in the browser.

name: Animate Height
desc: Lightweight React component for animating height using CSS transitions. Perfect for accordions, expandable panels, and collapsible content.

name: Drei 3D Effects
desc: Useful helpers and abstractions for react-three-fiber: Stars, Float, MeshDistortMaterial, and more.

name: Postprocessing
desc: postprocessing wrapper for React and @react-three/fiber

name: 3D Shader Gradient
desc: Stunning 3D mesh gradients powered by WebGL shaders. Create animated, interactive gradient backgrounds with water, plane, and sphere styles reminiscent of Apple's design language.

name: Circular Progressbar
desc: A circular progress indicator component with customizable styles, colors, and animations. Perfect for dashboards and stats displays.

name: Vertical Timeline Component
desc: Vertical timeline for React.js

name: Motion
desc: The most popular React animation library — spring physics, layout animations, gestures, exit transitions, and scroll-triggered effects.

name: GSAP
desc: Professional-grade JavaScript animation library for high-performance tweens, timelines, and complex sequenced animations.

name: Anime.js
desc: Lightweight JavaScript animation engine with stagger, timeline, and spring physics

name: tsParticles
desc: Highly configurable particle animations with interactive links and physics

name: Type Animation
desc: Customizable React typing animation component based on typical.

name: Animated Cursor
desc: An animated custom cursor component in React with a trailing dot and ring that scales on hover.

name: Cursor Effects
desc: Old-school cursor effects for your browser built in modern JavaScript.

name: Partycles
desc: Delightful particle reward animations for React — confetti, stars, hearts, fireworks and more via a simple hook

name: Particle Morph
desc: WebGL particle engine that morphs thousands of particles into text, images, and shapes with interactive mouse effects and smooth transitions.

name: Moving Text
desc: CSS text motion presets for React — fade, bounce, slide, swing, jelly, and more with zero config.

name: Flip Toolkit
desc: Configurable FLIP animation helpers for React

name: Text Scramble
desc: Matrix-style text scramble and decode animation. Characters randomize and resolve into the target string, creating a hacker/cyberpunk reveal effect. Powered by use-scramble.

name: Flubber
desc: Organic SVG shape morphing with smooth interpolation between arbitrary paths — circles, stars, hearts, and more

name: Theatre.js
desc: Motion design editor and animation library for precise, timeline-based choreography — sequence complex multi-property animations with programmatic or visual control.

name: Rive Canvas
desc: Interactive state-machine-driven vector animations rendered via WebGL/Canvas — the next-gen Lottie alternative with built-in interactivity, physics, and 60fps GPU-accelerated playback

name: Spline 3D
desc: Embed interactive 3D scenes built in Spline directly into React — full event system, variable control, and dynamic property updates with no Three.js knowledge required

name: Atropos
desc: Apple TV-style 3D parallax hover effects — multi-layer depth with touch support, only 2KB gzipped with zero dependencies

name: Confetti Explosion
desc: Lightweight CSS-animation based confetti explosion that fires on mount — perfect for celebratory moments

name: Vivus
desc: SVG drawing animation that progressively reveals strokes one by one — draw geometric patterns, logos, and illustrations

name: Dotlottie React
desc: High-performance Lottie animation player for React using the dotLottie format — play rich vector animations from LottieFiles

name: Granim
desc: Create fluid and interactive gradient animations with this small js library. Smooth color transitions morph between multiple gradient states on a canvas element.

name: Animated Numbers
desc: Smoothly animate number changes with spring physics. Perfect for dashboards, stats counters, and live metrics that update in real time.

name: Just Parallax
desc: Lightweight React library for mouse-move and scroll parallax effects. Create layered depth compositions with elements that respond to cursor position at different speeds.

name: Simple Parallax
desc: Lightweight image parallax effect that applies smooth CSS transforms to images on scroll. Zero dependencies, works with any img element.

name: React Parallax
desc: Classic background parallax sections with configurable scroll strength, blur effects, and multi-layer support. Perfect for hero banners and landing pages.

name: Parallax Mouse
desc: Mouse cursor-driven parallax layers where elements follow your cursor at different speeds, creating a fluid depth effect. Lightweight and easy to set up.

name: Swipe Parallax Transition
desc: iOS-style page transition where foreground and background layers move at different speeds during swipe, creating a natural depth parallax effect. Powered by Motion.

name: Floating Elements
desc: Decorative elements float up with a fade-in, gently bob in place while idle, then slide up and disappear on exit. Perfect for landing page icons, emoji decorations, and ambient visual accents.

name: Animated Glow Border
desc: Rotating multi-color conic gradient border with layered glow. CSS-only implementation inspired by react-native-animated-glow (Skia). No external library required.
